bugs.title: smithingDiamondUpgradePreservesSpec only checks SpecRegistry, never performs smithing-table craft
bugs.evidence: private fun runDiamondPreservesSpec(ctx: GameTestHelper) { val item = BuiltInRegistries.ITEM.get(itemId)...; val spec = SpecRegistry.lookup(item) ?: throw ...; if (spec.id != "longsword_diamond") ... }
bugs.expected: Test name 'smithingDiamondUpgradePreservesSpec' implies verifying that an in-world smithing-table upgrade produces a longsword_diamond with correct stats. Current test only verifies registration.
bugs.suggested_fix: Expand to perform an in-world smithing craft: simulate the SmithingTransformRecipe with longsword + diamond_weapon_upgrade_template + diamond, obtain output ItemStack, assert id + SpecRegistry stats.

bugs.title: AssertionError message hardcodes '+1' instead of using Tier.DIAMOND.damageBonus
bugs.expected: Use Tier.DIAMOND.damageBonus in the message to stay accurate if enum value ever changes.
